name: Loose Connection
overview: Loose Connection is a 2018 Kannada language Comedy Web Television Series created by Eesham Khan and Hasin Khan. It stars Sunil Raao, Sindhu Loknath and Anupama Gowda in the lead roles.

trailers.title: EPISODE 01 | LOOSE CONNECTION | KANNADA WEB SERIES | SAKKATH STUDIO
